name: Chile Pepper Jamaican Jerk Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. Roast the pimento berries in a dry skillet until fragrant (about 2 minutes). Remove and crush them to a powder.
2. Add all ingredients into a blender or food processor and puree to create the sauce.
3. Store the marinade in the refrigerator; it will keep for up to one month.
